items.text: Complete the Trail of the Ancestors, speak to Hinekora → +2 weapon-set skill points
Isle of Kin: The Blind Beast → +2 weapon-set skill points
Yama the White drops a Silver Coin → take it to the Trail of the Ancestors → +2 passive skill points
Beast Pen: claim the Level 12 Uncut Skill Gem
Heart of the Tribe: clear the Meeting House bonus objective for free loot
